name: MoMRAH — Urban Planning & Municipal Approval
standard: Ministry of Municipal, Rural Affairs and Housing — Urban Planning Regulations
description: Enables OCERP built-in validation rules that check submittals against MoMRAH municipal urban-planning requirements: zoning compliance, setbacks, FAR/built-up area ratios, parking provision per use class, and required attachments for the Balady building-permit portal.
